title: Basic Gap Setup
description: Create a 3-column grid with 6 items. Add a 20px gap between all tracks. Then try changing the column gap to 40px while keeping row gap at 20px.
hint: Use `gap: 20px` for equal gaps, then change to `row-gap: 20px; column-gap: 40px;` for different values.

title: Responsive Gap Strategy
description: Build a responsive card grid that uses different gap values at different breakpoints: 8px on mobile (<600px), 16px on tablet (600-1024px), and 32px on desktop (>1024px). Use media queries to change the gap.

starterCode.html:
Card 1
Card 2
Card 3
Card 4
Card 5
Card 6

hint: Use `@media (min-width: 600px) { .card-grid { gap: 16px; } }` for tablet. For desktop, change to 32px. The order matters — put the larger breakpoint last.

title: Hybrid Layout: Gap + Padding + Margins
description: Create a dashboard layout that uses gap for uniform internal spacing, padding for container breathing room, and selective margins on specific items for special positioning. The layout should have 4 cards in a 2×2 grid with 20px gap and 30px container padding. The third card should have a 40px top margin that creates extra spacing above it (simulating a callout or alert), and the fourth card should have negative margins to visually break out of the grid alignment.

starterCode.html:
Analytics Panel
User Activity
⚠ System Alert — needs more visual emphasis
🌟 Featured — breaks out of alignment

hint: For gap + padding: `gap: 20px; padding: 30px;`. For the alert card: `margin-top: 40px;`. For the breakout effect: use negative margins like `margin-left: -20px; margin-right: -20px;` combined with a wider width or `padding` to compensate.
